sourceMovie.title: Vanguard
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Vanguard (2020) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Stanley Tong Gwai-Lai's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: RED
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Vanguard clicked for you, RED (2010) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Accident Man
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Vanguard clicked for you, Accident Man (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Vanguard?
faq.answer: Try RED, Accident Man, The Losers—each shares DNA with Vanguard while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Vanguard?
faq.answer: Vanguard (2020) is best described as Action, Adventure, Comedy, Crime, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Vanguard worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
